targets.expr: increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])

max without(prediction_type)
(
  label_replace(
    # margin_upper_band
    avg_over_time(increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])[$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]) * $MARGIN_MULTIPLIER,
    "prediction_type", "margin", "", ""
  )
  or
  label_replace(
    # upper_band_st
    avg_over_time(increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])[$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m])
    # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_st
    + avg_over_time
    (
      (
        # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_1h:filtered
        stddev_over_time(
          increase
          (
            peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]
          )
          [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
        ) > avg_over_time
        (
          increase
          (
            peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]
          )
          [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
        )
        * $THRESHOLD_BY_COVAR
      )
      [$LONG_LOOKBACK:1m]
    )
    * $STDDEV_MULTIPLIER,
    "prediction_type", "short_term", "", ""
  )
)

clamp_min(min without(prediction_type)
(
  label_replace(
    # margin_lower_band
    avg_over_time(increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])[$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]) / $MARGIN_MULTIPLIER,
    "prediction_type", "margin", "", ""
  )
  or
  # lower_band_st
  label_replace(
    avg_over_time(increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])[$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m])
    # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_st
    - avg_over_time
    (
      (
        # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_1h:filtered
        stddev_over_time
        (
          increase
          (
            peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]
          )
          [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
        )
        > avg_over_time
        (
          increase
          (
            peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]
          )
          [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
        )
        * $THRESHOLD_BY_COVAR
      )
      [$LONG_LOOKBACK:1m]
    )
    * $STDDEV_MULTIPLIER,
    "prediction_type", "short_term", "", ""
  )
), 0)

(
    last_over_time(
      increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])
      [2m:1s]
    )
    < bool last_over_time
    (
      (
        clamp_min(min without(prediction_type)
        (
          label_replace(
            # margin_lower_band
            avg_over_time(increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])[$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]) / $MARGIN_MULTIPLIER,
            "prediction_type", "margin", "", ""
          )
          or
          # lower_band_st
          label_replace(
            avg_over_time(increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])[$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m])
            # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_st
            - avg_over_time
            (
              (
                # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_1h:filtered
                stddev_over_time
                (
                  increase
                  (
                    peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]
                  )
                  [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
                )
                > avg_over_time
                (
                  increase
                  (
                    peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]
                  )
                  [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
                )
                * $THRESHOLD_BY_COVAR
              )
              [$LONG_LOOKBACK:1m]
            )
            * $STDDEV_MULTIPLIER,
            "prediction_type", "short_term", "", ""
          )
        ), 0)
      )
      [2m:1s]
    )
)
+
(
    last_over_time
    (
      increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])
      [2m:1s]
    )
    > bool last_over_time
    (
      (
        max without(prediction_type)
        (
          label_replace(
            # margin_upper_band
            avg_over_time(increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])[$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]) * $MARGIN_MULTIPLIER,
            "prediction_type", "margin", "", ""
          )
          or
          label_replace(
            # upper_band_st
            avg_over_time(increase(peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL])[$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m])
            # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_st
            + avg_over_time
            (
              (
                # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_1h:filtered
                stddev_over_time(
                  increase
                  (
                    peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]
                  )
                  [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
                ) > avg_over_time
                (
                  increase
                  (
                    peerobserver_conn_closed{host="$HOST"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]
                  )
                  [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
                )
                * $THRESHOLD_BY_COVAR
              )
              [$LONG_LOOKBACK:1m]
            )
            * $STDDEV_MULTIPLIER,
            "prediction_type", "short_term", "", ""
          )
        )
      )
      [2m:1s]
    )
)
> bool 0

sum( increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]) ) / sum ( increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]) )

max without(prediction_type)
(
  label_replace(
    # margin_lower_band
    avg_over_time
    (
        # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
        (
            sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
            / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
        )
        [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
    ) * $MARGIN_MULTIPLIER,
    "prediction_type", "margin", "", ""
  )
  or
  # lower_band_st
  label_replace(
    avg_over_time(
      # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
      (
          sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
          / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
      )
      [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
    )
    # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_st
    + avg_over_time
    (
      (
        # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_1h:filtered
        stddev_over_time
        (
            # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
            (
                sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
            )
            [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
        )
        > avg_over_time
        (
            # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
            (
                sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                / sum ( increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
            ) 
            [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
        )
        * $THRESHOLD_BY_COVAR
      )
      [$LONG_LOOKBACK:1m]
    )
    * $STDDEV_MULTIPLIER,
    "prediction_type", "short_term", "", ""
  )
)

clamp_min(min without(prediction_type)
(
  label_replace(
    # margin_lower_band
    avg_over_time
    (
        # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
        (
            sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
            / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
        )
        [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
    ) / $MARGIN_MULTIPLIER,
    "prediction_type", "margin", "", ""
  )
  or
  # lower_band_st
  label_replace(
    avg_over_time(
      # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
      (
          sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
          / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
      )
      [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
    )
    # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_st
    - avg_over_time
    (
      (
        # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_1h:filtered
        stddev_over_time
        (
            # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
            (
                sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
            )
            [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
        )
        > avg_over_time
        (
            # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
            (
                sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                / sum ( increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
            ) 
            [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
        )
        * $THRESHOLD_BY_COVAR
      )
      [$LONG_LOOKBACK:1m]
    )
    * $STDDEV_MULTIPLIER,
    "prediction_type", "short_term", "", ""
  )
), 0)

(
    last_over_time(
      # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
      (
          sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
          / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
      )
      [2m:1s]
    )
    < bool last_over_time
    (
      (
        clamp_min(min without(prediction_type)
        (
          label_replace(
            # margin_lower_band
            avg_over_time(
              # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
              (
                sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
              )
              [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
            ) / $MARGIN_MULTIPLIER,
            "prediction_type", "margin", "", ""
          )
          or
          # lower_band_st
          label_replace(
            avg_over_time(
              # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
              (
                sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
              )
              [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
            )
            # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_st
            - avg_over_time
            (
              (
                # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_1h:filtered
                stddev_over_time
                (
                  # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
                  (
                    sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                    / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                  )
                  [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
                )
                > avg_over_time
                (
                  # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
                  (
                    sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                    / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                  )
                  [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
                )
                * $THRESHOLD_BY_COVAR
              )
              [$LONG_LOOKBACK:1m]
            )
            * $STDDEV_MULTIPLIER,
            "prediction_type", "short_term", "", ""
          )
        ), 0)
      )
      [2m:1s]
    )
)
+
(
    last_over_time
    (
      # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
      (
          sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
          / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
      )
      [2m:1s]
    )
    > bool last_over_time
    (
      (
        max without(prediction_type)
        (
          label_replace(
            # margin_upper_band
            avg_over_time(
              # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
              (
                sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
              )
              [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
            ) * $MARGIN_MULTIPLIER,
            "prediction_type", "margin", "", ""
          )
          or
          label_replace(
            # upper_band_st
            avg_over_time(
              # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
              (
                sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
              )
              [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
            )
            # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_st
            + avg_over_time
            (
              (
                # anomaly:adaptive:stddev_1h:filtered
                stddev_over_time(
                  # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
                  (
                    sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                    / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                  )
                  [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
                ) > avg_over_time
                (
                  # peerobserver_p2p_share_linkinglion_total
                  (
                    sum(increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes_linkinglion{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                    / sum (increase(peerobserver_p2p_message_bytes{host="$HOST", direction="outbound"}[$INCREASE_INTERVAL]))
                  )
                  [$SHORT_LOOKBACK:1m]
                )
                * $THRESHOLD_BY_COVAR
              )
              [$LONG_LOOKBACK:1m]
            )
            * $STDDEV_MULTIPLIER,
            "prediction_type", "short_term", "", ""
          )
        )
      )
      [2m:1s]
    )
)
> bool 0

panels.title: Outbound traffic share to LinkingLion peers

list.description: Used to filter the short interval standard deviation.
list.name: THRESHOLD_BY_COVAR

list.description: How many standard deviations from the mean to start looking for outliers. For a normal distribution, if this value is 2, the anomaly rate would be 4.55%.
list.name: STDDEV_MULTIPLIER

list.description: For the case the metric doesn't have high variation, we look at anomalies only based on the mean. The anomaly thresholds are at the mean multiplied and divided by this value.
list.name: MARGIN_MULTIPLIER

list.description: The range used for computing the increase of monotonic metrics.
list.name: INCREASE_INTERVAL

list.description: The time interval to use as look-back when computing the simple anomaly expressions.
list.name: SHORT_LOOKBACK

list.description: The time interval to use as look-back when computing the amortized standard deviation. Default: 26h.
list.name: LONG_LOOKBACK
